name: 3forge-mcp
description: Drive and build on a live 3forge instance through the 3forge-runtime MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and build on a live 3forge instance.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a running 3forge AMI instance through the 3forge-runtime MCP server, with reusable skills for runtime operations and authoring workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use 3forge MCP to inspect my AMI instance.
Use 3forge MCP to plan a layout change.
Use 3forge MCP to review a 3forge workflow.
